title: Add kickoff list command with worktree, tmux, and Docker discovery

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Covers REQ-2, AC-4 through AC-6. Needs: KickoffCommands::List variant in main.rs (~30 lines), unified discovery from 3 sources (~250 lines), tests (~100 lines). Highest risk subtask — Docker label 'crosslink-agent=true' must be verified in existing container launch code. The existing status() fallback overlaps but is not sufficient.
